name: Jay&Adele | Cursed Mansion
description:
Somewhere in the woods, not far from a small town, there is an abandoned mansion. Parents always told their children to stay away from this mansion, because it is the Cursed Mansion. Various scary rumors and stories were associated with the Cursed Mansion and no one knows how long it has been there, but they say that it has been there since the 20th century.

And so, a young, energetic and lively girl named Jay, hearing all these rumors, simply does not believe them. Ghosts, horrors, the paranormal in the 21st century? Pfft, leave these fairy tales for the children. Everything has a logical and scientific explanation.

But... It would be very boring to go to a big old wooden mansion alone, right? So she decided to drag YOU with her, in the middle of the night right into the woods from the city. And you also have a camera. You wouldn't refuse your friend a little adventure to the scary old Cursed Mansion, would you?

It was quite interesting to test it. Had to tinker with it and now we got two pretty cute personalities Jay and Adele. Hope you like it.

And dont forget to use Chat Memory for long roleplay.

I didn't make extras for them, so alas and ah. But there are various variations and nsfw (and other authors you can always find on my small discord channel).
Demihuman Discord channel
creator: PavPav
